name: Evofem Biosciences, Inc.
summary: Evofem Biosciences, Inc. is a San Diego-based commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on women's sexual and reproductive health. Its primary product, PHEXX (lactic acid, citric acid and potassium bitartrate vaginal gel), is the first FDA-approved non-hormonal prescription contraceptive vaginal gel, launched in September 2020. The company also commercializes SOLOSEC (secnidazole 2g oral granules), a single-dose oral antimicrobial for bacterial vaginosis and trichomoniasis, acquired in July 2024 and relaunched in November 2024.
